notes: Right-click VORP menu trimmed to Generate Code / Send to Friend / Store to Vault. Send to Group + Create Link removed (registry + Rust + JS code purged). Generate Code is now silent — uploads, copies the 3-word code to clipboard, fires a 'Code copied · valid 5 min' toast. notify() now logs every step so dev tools can confirm whether toasts are firing or being suppressed by Windows.
